notes: Rebuilt pybambu package from scratch with 8 commits following staircase progression. Implemented: PrintJob (print state), Extruder (active nozzle), Info (nozzle/door), AMSList/AMS/Tray (filament tracking), Temperature (dual nozzle temps), HMSList (HMS errors with i18n), PrintError (print errors with i18n). Error lookup supports multi-language fallback (en, de, es, fr, pt-BR) and model fallback chains.
